changes: Added ACTION_SCANNER_TRIG constant for hardware trigger broadcast
Implemented public onKeyDown(keyCode: Int, event: KeyEvent) method
Implemented private triggerScan() method for sending broadcast intent

patterns_discovered.description: F6 key event (KEYCODE_F6) is intercepted at Activity level and delegated to scanner manager for processing
Hardware button triggers internal broadcast intent (ACTION_SCANNER_TRIG) to communicate with scanner service
Public onKeyDown() method handles event routing, delegating to private triggerScan() for broadcast logic
Extensive KDoc comments with code examples showing Activity integration requirements
Debug logging at key decision points (button press, broadcast sent) for troubleshooting

gotchas_discovered.description: onKeyDown() method must be explicitly called from Activity's onKeyDown() override - not automatic
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documented with code example in method KDoc

gotchas_discovered.description: F6 key code is specific to Newland MT90 device - may vary across hardware revisions or Android versions
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify key code compatibility testing across target devices

gotchas_discovered.description: Must check for ACTION_DOWN to prevent duplicate scan triggers from key repeat events
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implementation correctly filters with event.action == KeyEvent.ACTION_DOWN

gotchas_discovered.description: triggerScan() relies on scanner service being registered to receive ACTION_SCANNER_TRIG broadcast
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implementation logs broadcast sent, but no error handling for missing receiver

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented hardware button handler (KEYCODE_F6) for Newland MT90 scanner with proper abstraction, documentation, and logging

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for onKeyDown() method with mock KeyEvent objects testing F6 press, other key presses, and ACTION_DOWN filtering
Add try-catch in triggerScan() to handle potential SecurityException from sendBroadcast() if permissions are missing
Consider making KEYCODE_F6 configurable via constants to support hardware variations across MT90 firmware versions
Add integration guide documenting how to properly override onKeyDown() in Activity, considering fragment usage patterns
Consider adding onKeyUp() handler if double-tap or long-press functionality is needed in the future
